title: Post-harvest losses
description: Grain spoils in humid storage; smallholders lack dryers and hermetic bags.

title: Soil health data gaps
description: Farmers apply fertilizer blindly; affordable soil testing and digital extension are sparse.

title: Livestock disease surveillance
description: Cross-border animal movement spreads fever viruses; vaccination records are paper-based.

title: Fisheries overcapacity
description: Subsidy-driven fleets exceed sustainable catch; monitoring and enforcement are limited offshore.

title: Urban vertical farm economics
description: LED and HVAC costs dominate; produce must compete with field-grown imports on price.

title: Fair trade verification
description: Cooperatives struggle to prove premium payments to consumers; audits are expensive.

title: Agrochemical runoff
description: Nitrogen and pesticides reach rivers; buffer zones and precision spraying reduce load but need capital.

title: Farm labor shortage
description: Seasonal picking relies on migrant workers with uncertain visas; automation is capital-intensive.

title: Seed sovereignty
description: Hybrid and patented seeds limit farmer seed-saving; local landrace conservation is underfunded.

title: Food fraud and adulteration
description: Olive oil and honey are diluted; lab tests are slow and costly for retailers.

title: Climate-smart varieties
description: Drought-tolerant seeds exist but adoption lags where extension and credit are weak.

title: Aquaculture disease
description: Dense fish pens spread pathogens; antibiotics raise resistance and export barriers.
